title: Simple Trade Mod
body:
A Simple Serverside trading mod.

To initiate a trade, run the command `/trade request <player-name>`\
Place your Items in the 3x3 grid and they'll automatically show up on the right grid in your partners view.

Confirm and lock your offer by clicking on the Lime Terracotta or Abort the trade with the Red Terracotta.\
If you confirm your offer and your partner changes theirs, your offer will be unlocked as a security measure.

Once you and your trade partner both confirm, the items are exchanged and the GUI will close.
